summary: v2.25 Sections retest after main agent's 1-line PATCH whitelist fix. Backend: 13/13 PASS in test_v225.py (extended from 11 → 13 by adding explicit PATCH section_id tests for routines & transactions, in addition to the original task PATCH). All three patch endpoints now correctly persist section_id: PATCH /tasks/{id} {section_id:<sid>} → returns 200 with section_id set; PATCH with {section_id:null} clears it; same verified for /routines/{rid} (with GET-back verification) and /transactions/{tid} (with GET-back verification). The original failing case (test_patch_task_section_id_set_and_clear) now passes. Frontend smoke: login + /tasks page renders with all v2.25 SectionBars (NO SECTION, MORNING, TEST_UI_v225_df039) and 18+ task-section-* testids present (bars + controls: toggle/name/count/rename/up/down). Did NOT exercise full row→picker→move-and-reload smoke this iteration due to loop-prevention after candidate row-button selection picked the SectionBar div by mistake; iteration_24 already smoke-validated that the picker opens with correct options [MOVE TO SECTION, No section, MORNING, TEST_UI_v225_*] and the frontend code was untouched in this iteration — so with the backend fix in place the move-reload flow is now unblocked by transitivity.
action_items: Main agent can self-verify the frontend move-row→reload flow by: (1) login Karan @ /tasks, (2) expand NO SECTION (click [data-testid='task-section-none-toggle']), (3) hover any task row and click its row-level section icon, (4) pick MORNING in [data-testid='section-picker'], (5) reload → task should now render under MORNING SectionBar and the row's section icon should have gold glow.

(Optional, nice-to-have, deferred from iteration_24) Add server-side validation that section_id (when set) belongs to a Section whose project_id matches the row's project_id — currently a cross-project sid could be assigned silently.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py L614,772,1075: Fix applied correctly — 'section_id' is now in all three PATCH allowed-key sets. Verified via grep + 13/13 pytest pass. ✓
Test coverage gap closed: test_v225.py now exercises section_id PATCH on all three modules (tasks/routines/transactions) with GET-back persistence verification, not just status codes.

success_rate.backend: 100% (13/13 v2.25 — all CRUD, ordering, reorder, cascade-on-delete, permissions, validation, and PATCH section_id on all 3 modules green)
success_rate.frontend: ~95% — testids and SectionBars confirmed rendering; full move-reload e2e not re-run this iteration (iteration_24 covered up to picker-opens-with-correct-options; backend was the only blocker and is now fixed)

test_credentials: karan@mindmatters.local / changeme123 (plus a per-run viewer_<hex>@v225.test for permissions tests)
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create one throwaway project per run (TEST_v225_<hex>) and tear it down via autouse cleanup. test_non_member_get_returns_403 still creates a TEST_v225_private_* project that is NOT torn down (carryover from iteration_24) — main agent may want a periodic GC.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v2.25 backend is fully green (13/13). test_v225.py is the canonical regression suite for project-scoped Sections. The only remaining untested area for v2.25 is the SectionBar interactive controls (toggle/up/down/delete/rename) at the UI layer — iteration_24 saw the testids exist but no one has clicked them end-to-end yet. Recommend covering in next UI-focused iteration after main agent flags any v2.26+ work.
rca of the issue: Confirmed fix: main agent appended 'section_id' to the three PATCH whitelists (server.py:614 tasks, :772 routines, :1075 transactions). Grep confirms presence; pytest 13/13 confirms behaviour end-to-end (set, clear, and GET-back persistence on tasks/routines/transactions). The previously failing reproduction (POST task → POST section → PATCH task {section_id:sid} → response.section_id was null) now returns section_id=sid and persists across GET.
